divisions.name: 8U Division
divisions.description: Entry-level division for players ages 7–8 focused on fundamentals, coach pitch, and fun introductions to fastpitch softball.

divisions.name: 10U Division
divisions.description: Recreational and beginner-friendly play for ages 9–10 with live pitching introduced and continued focus on fundamentals.

divisions.name: 12U Division
divisions.description: Competitive play for ages 11–12 with full fastpitch rules, advanced skills development, and division-specific equipment regulations.

divisions.name: 14U Division
divisions.description: Intermediate to advanced division for ages 13–14 with full game rules, standings, and expanded tournament play.

divisions.name: 16U Division
divisions.description: Advanced division for ages 15–16 focused on high school prep, position specialization, and showcase-style competition.

fields.name: Field 1
fields.notes: Regulation fastpitch field with bleachers on the first-base side. Commonly used for 12U and 14U evening games.

fields.name: Field 2
fields.notes: Primary lighted field adjacent to the main concession stand. Preferred for night games and evening volunteer shifts.

fields.name: Field 3
fields.notes: Daytime practice field without lights. Often used for younger divisions and clinics.

fields.name: Batting Cages
fields.notes: Four-station batting cage area with pitching machines available by reservation for clinics and team practices.

product_categories.name: Apparel
product_categories.description: Youth and adult shirts, jerseys, hoodies, and other league-branded clothing.

product_categories.name: Hats & Caps
product_categories.description: Adjustable and fitted caps for players, coaches, and fans.

product_categories.name: Accessories
product_categories.description: Water bottles, bags, stickers, and other softball accessories.

product_categories.name: Equipment
product_categories.description: Helmets, training aids, and other gear approved for league use.

product_categories.name: Other
product_categories.description: Miscellaneous league items, fees, and digital products.

clinics.name: July 2026 12U Pitching Power Clinic
clinics.description: Four-evening 12U pitching clinic focused on mechanics, accuracy, and strength. Sessions run from 5:00–7:30 PM at Field 2 under the lights.

clinics.name: July 2026 10U Pitching Fundamentals
clinics.description: Two-day fundamentals clinic for new and developing 10U pitchers. Emphasis on grip, stride, and safe workload.

clinics.name: July 2026 14U Elite Pitching Lab
clinics.description: Advanced 14U pitching lab with video analysis and spin-rate tracking. Designed for experienced pitchers preparing for high school play.

clinics.name: July 2026 All-Division Hitting Camp
clinics.description: Three-afternoon camp focused on hitting approach, tee and front-toss work, and live BP in the batting cages for 10U–14U players grouped by age.

clinics.name: June 2026 10U General Skills Clinic
clinics.description: Balanced three-day clinic covering throwing, fielding, base running, and hitting for newer 10U players.

clinics.name: May 2026 12U Catching Clinic
clinics.description: Three-evening clinic for current and prospective 12U catchers, focusing on receiving, blocking, and throwdowns.

clinics.name: August 2026 Speed & Conditioning Camp
clinics.description: Four-day conditioning camp for 12U–16U players focused on speed, agility, and injury-prevention exercises.

clinics.name: April 2026 8U Fielding Fundamentals
clinics.description: Single-session clinic introducing basic infield and outfield fielding fundamentals to new 8U players.

programs.name: Spring 2026 12U Weeknight League
programs.description: Primary 12U league with weeknight practices and games, focusing on player development and balanced competition.
programs.location_summary: Games at Fields 1 & 2, practices at Fields 1–3.

programs.name: Spring 2026 12U Saturday Developmental
programs.description: Development-focused Saturday-only program for multi-sport 12U athletes seeking additional reps.

programs.name: Spring 2026 10U Recreational League
programs.description: Beginner-friendly 10U league introducing players to fastpitch rules in a fun environment.
programs.location_summary: Games at Field 3, occasional games at Field 1.

programs.name: Spring 2026 14U Competitive League
programs.description: Standings-based 14U league with weekday games and weekend doubleheaders.

programs.name: Summer 2026 12U Travel Prep Program
programs.description: Short summer season designed to prepare 12U players for travel and school ball tryouts.

programs.name: Summer 2026 10U Skills & Scrimmage
programs.description: Light summer program with one practice and one scrimmage per week for 10U players.
programs.location_summary: Practices at Field 3; scrimmages rotate between Fields 1 & 3.

programs.name: Fall 2026 12U Fall Ball League
programs.description: Off-season league emphasizing development and reps for 12U players.

programs.name: Spring 2025 12U League (Archived)
programs.description: Archived information for the completed Spring 2025 12U league.

rule_documents.title: League Code of Conduct
rule_documents.content: The League Code of Conduct applies to all players, coaches, umpires, and spectators. It prohibits abusive language, harassment, and unsportsmanlike behavior. Violations may result in warnings, suspensions, or removal from the facility. Parents and guardians are responsible for the behavior of all guests they bring to league events.

rule_documents.title: 12U Division Playing Rules
rule_documents.content: The 12U Division uses full fastpitch rules with a 12-inch softball. Games are 6 innings or 1 hour 30 minutes, whichever comes first. Stealing is permitted once the ball leaves the pitcher’s hand. Pitchers may throw a maximum of 4 innings per day across all competitions. Equipment must comply with 12U bat regulations and safety requirements.

rule_documents.title: 12U Bat Rules
rule_documents.content: For the 12U Division, only fastpitch softball bats bearing the current USA Softball, USSSA, NSA, or ISA certification marks are permitted. Maximum barrel diameter is 2 1/4 inches. Bats must not be altered or damaged and may be removed from play at the discretion of the umpire or league officials. Illegal bats used in play will result in the batter being called out and potential ejection for repeated violations.

rule_documents.title: 10U Bat Rules
rule_documents.content: For the 10U Division, bats must be fastpitch-approved with a maximum barrel diameter of 2 1/4 inches. Lightweight training bats may be used during practices but not in games. Any bat deemed unsafe by umpires or league staff will be removed immediately.

rule_documents.title: General Safety & Weather Policy
rule_documents.content: The league follows a lightning and severe weather policy requiring immediate suspension of play when lightning is detected within 10 miles. Play may not resume until 30 minutes after the last observed lightning strike. Helmets with face masks are required for batters and base runners in all divisions.

rule_documents.title: Media & Photo Consent Policy
rule_documents.content: By registering, families grant the league permission to use player photos and video for league communications and social media, unless they opt out in writing. Players will never be identified by full name without prior consent.

teams.name: 14U Thunder
teams.description: Balanced 14U team competing in the Spring 2026 14U Competitive League.

teams.name: 14U Storm
teams.description: Advanced 14U squad focused on tournament play and travel competition.

teams.name: 12U Lightning
teams.description: Competitive 12U team with an emphasis on strong defense and team culture.

teams.name: 12U Dragons
teams.description: Recreational 12U team for players building confidence and game experience.

teams.name: 10U Comets
teams.description: Beginner-friendly 10U team within 5 miles of ZIP 12345, focused on fundamentals.

teams.name: 10U Sparks
teams.description: Beginner 10U team with early evening weekday practices.

teams.name: 10U Wildcats
teams.description: Recreational 10U team for players with 1–2 years of experience.

teams.name: 8U Fireflies
teams.description: Coach-pitch 8U team focused on fun and introductory skills.

teams.name: 16U Wave
teams.description: High-level 16U team preparing players for varsity high school softball.

teams.name: 12U Phantoms
teams.description: Travel-focused 12U team playing in local and regional tournaments.

teams.name: 10U Panthers
teams.description: 10U team with players transitioning from beginner to intermediate level.
